Method.desc: Merges a table of configuration values into the spoon.
Method.doc: Merges a table of configuration values into the spoon. Accepts any of the public variables (clickDebounce, watchdogInterval, healthCheckInterval, logToFile, logFilePath, maxLogSize).
Method.name: configure

Method.desc: Starts the click-through event tap (and watchdog / health-check timers if configured).
Method.doc: Starts the click-through event tap (and watchdog / health-check timers if configured).
Method.name: start

Method.desc: Stops the event tap and any timers, and closes the file log if open.
Method.doc: Stops the event tap and any timers, and closes the file log if open.
Method.name: stop

Variable.desc: Logger object used within the Spoon. Set its log level to control verbosity.
Variable.doc: Logger object used within the Spoon. Set its log level to control verbosity.
Variable.name: logger

Variable.desc: Seconds; clicks within this window of the previous one are ignored.
Variable.doc: Seconds; clicks within this window of the previous one are ignored (double/triple clicks and OS auto-repeat). Default 0.05.
Variable.name: clickDebounce

Variable.desc: Seconds between event-tap health checks; restarts the tap if macOS disabled it.
Variable.doc: Seconds between event-tap health checks; if the tap was disabled by macOS it is restarted. Set to 0 to disable. Default 5.
Variable.name: watchdogInterval

Variable.desc: Seconds between debug 'tap is alive' log entries. 0 disables.
Variable.doc: Seconds between debug-level 'tap is alive' log entries. 0 disables. Default 0.
Variable.name: healthCheckInterval

Variable.desc: If true, also write a rotating file log in addition to hs.logger output.
Variable.doc: If true, also write a rotating file log in addition to hs.logger output. Default false.
Variable.name: logToFile

Variable.desc: Path for the optional file log.
Variable.doc: Path for the optional file log. Default ~/hammerspoon_clickthrough.log.
Variable.name: logFilePath

Variable.desc: Rotate the file log when it grows past this many bytes.
Variable.doc: Rotate the file log when it grows past this many bytes. Default 5 MiB.
Variable.name: maxLogSize

desc: Click-through (focus-on-click) for macOS: one click both focuses and activates.
doc:
Click-through (focus-on-click) for macOS: a single click both focuses the window or accessibility element under the cursor *and* activates it, instead of requiring the usual two clicks for unfocused windows.

Detects the click target with hs.window first, falling back to hs.axuielement.systemElementAtPosition for non-window UI (panels, popovers, toolbar items, status-bar widgets). Dialogs and menus are deliberately passed through untouched so they keep their normal interaction model.

A watchdog restarts the event tap if macOS silently disables it, which happens when any single tap callback blocks for too long.
name: ClickThrough
